query:

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM processos) as processos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM estrategias) as estrategias,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM conhecimentos) as conhecimentos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM movimentacoes) as movimentacoes,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dados_financeiros) as dados_financeiros,

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM movimentacoes_financeiras) as mov_financeiras,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM prazos_processuais) as prazos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM peticoes_geradas) as peticoes,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM partes_processuais) as partes,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cumprimentos_sentenca) as cumprimentos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM analise_geral) as analise_geral
